Driver = search-over-programs via massive stochastic generation followed by execution-based validation, behavioral clustering, and robust candidate selection  
Dynamics = Speciation

Driver = Shift from lightweight single-image super-resolution benchmarking to dual-focused paired-image raindrop removal across day and night
Dynamics = Speciation

Driver = A robustness-oriented explainable malware detection method that treats feature-level attribution as an operational tool for auditing, error analysis, and refinement of malware classifiers under adversarial and distribution-shift stress.
Dynamics = Speciation

Driver = Shift from sandboxed runtime behavior analysis to lightweight static feature extraction and a sparse linear classifier for Android malware detection.  
Dynamics = Speciation

Driver = A transient-execution disclosure mechanism using faulting user-mode loads, cache-state encoding, and deferred permission checks for kernel memory exfiltration.
Dynamics = Speciation

Driver = Shifts fairness intervention from post-hoc modification of learned representations to training-time constrained optimization inside the classifier learning process.  
Dynamics = Speciation

Driver = A reproducibility-first audit methodology to separate true gains from implementation, tuning, and evaluation artifacts in benchmarked improvements.
Dynamics = Speciation

Driver = replace single-attack or weakly tuned evaluations with a comprehensive worst-case protocol and sanity checks for gradient masking  
Dynamics = Speciation

Driver = curriculum and pedagogy for integrating programming, databases, machine learning, and generative AI into university-level statistics education  
Dynamics = Speciation

Driver = Reframe benchmark evaluation from constructing detectors to auditing benchmarks for structural bias and evaluation distortion.
Dynamics = Speciation

Driver = Introduces a variational autoencoder with amortized inference and Gaussian reparameterization for scalable ELBO optimization.
Dynamics = Speciation
